messages.pollQuestion: D&D session for the week of {weekStart} — which slots work for you? (each is {duration}h)
messages.reminder: Reminder: please vote in this week's D&D poll! {mentions}
messages.winner: 🎲 This week's session: {slot}. See you there!
messages.tiebreakerIntro: We have a tie between {slots}. Please vote again:
messages.noVotes: No votes received — no session scheduled for this week.
messages.dmUnavailable: 🎲 The DM has no available slots this week — session cancelled.
